motto: Passive watch globally. Lawful kick on the wire. No bursts. No jamming.
allowed: Passive WiFi beacon scan (receive-only correlation via nmcli)
Disconnect OUR station from rogue or hostile APs (nmcli dev disconnect)
Firewall block hostile IPs on the wire path (nftables)
Trust Strike autokill at 100% certainty on correlated network threats
Operator-initiated soft rfkill on OUR wlan only (optional, off by default)
forbidden: Spoofed beacon frames or deceptive RF transmission
Automatic rfkill on heuristic burst spikes
